title: Asuka as an Impact Trigger
wikitext:
[]: Asuka as an Impact Trigger             Quote Post by Willynka » Wed Jul 10, 2013 12:51 am Is there any posibility that Asuka can be a trigger to a human instrumentality project in Rebuild movies? There are tones of comments about her contamination and eyepatch, but when you need to have two souls (A and L) to pick up the spears, she could be able to, because she probably has a little bit of an angel inside her and when she was absorbed by Bardiel, the second pair of hand grew from him.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Wed Jul 10, 2013 1:02 am I have only seen the first Rebuild film, but from what i know it sounds plausible for Asuka to be a potential trigger for Instrumentality. Hell, as far as i know pretty much any human could be such a trigger if he's on the right at the right time and doing the right things (Gendo) or just favored by the revelant divinities for whatever reason (Shinji).

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Jul 10, 2013 1:12 am Dream wrote: Hell, as far as i know pretty much any human could be such a trigger

[]:             Quote Post by Willynka » Wed Jul 10, 2013 1:21 am Yeah, because he was flying in tesseract in orbit and Asuka was obviously on Earth the whole 14 years, so she she could pass the same "test". And we still don't know what is underneath the clothes and eyepatch. But I was somehow amazed (those boring buses to jobs) by the fact that Bardiel had two pairs of hands in Ha when he absorbed Asuka in himself (Angel Soul, Human Soul and Angelic body). And as we know, two pairs of hands are needed to pick both spears. And If Asuka still has some of Bardiel's soul in her she now doesn't need to have an angel's body to do the same.......

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 10, 2013 2:53 am pwhodges wrote: But Shinji's treatment in Q is predicated on the idea that he alone is the trigger.

[]:             Quote Post by Willynka » Wed Jul 10, 2013 3:46 am ElMariachi wrote: Yeah, that something FINAL will have to clear : what exactly make someone a Trigger, Kaworu is one too, and the only thing those two have in common is that once Shinji got his eyes turned red(coincidently the moment he triggered N3I) Is it something that the trigger is born with, or can acquire, and how : great plug depth, piloting a "special" Evangelion(it was heavily implied thorough 1.0 and 2.0 that EVA-01 was special compared to the others), having a giant burst of heroic will while piloting said special Evangelion(symbolized by the glowing red eyes) and attaining an insane plug depth?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 10, 2013 4:27 am But Shinji triggered N3I all by himself 14 years ago, and according to your theory he can't have an angel soul, because then he couldn't have triggered N4I with Kaworu. For your theory to work, when N3I happened it should have been Rei who served as the Angel soul(that means that she has Lilith's soul like in NGE), but then that would mean that every human pilot is a trigger, does that mean that Asuka and Mari have a DSS Choker too?(that would explain why we never saw them out if their pluguits and Asuka was also wearing an high-collared sweater, explosives collars are out of fashion!) Thinking about it, that would fit with Ritsuko comment that neo-NERV taking Shinji means that they think that he still have the potential to be a Trigger : before that they though he lost this ability(probably in relation to his 0.00% synch rate) but still weren't completely sure since he still managed to awoke EVA-01 during operation US, hence the DSS Choker. But then why use such a complicated device like the DSS Choker, initially made for Kaworu, an Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by Willynka » Wed Jul 10, 2013 4:46 am ElMariachi wrote: But Shinji triggered N3I all by himself 14 years ago, and according to your theory he can't have an angel soul, because then he couldn't have triggered N4I with Kaworu. For your theory to work, when N3I happened it should have been Rei who served as the Angel soul(that means that she has Lilith's soul like in NGE), but then that would mean that every human pilot is a trigger, does that mean that Asuka and Mari have a DSS Choker too?(that would explain why we never saw them out if their pluguits and Asuka was also wearing an high-collared sweater, explosives collars are out of fashion!) Thinking about it, that would fit with Ritsuko comment that neo-NERV taking Shinji means that they think that he still have the potential to be a Trigger : before that they though he lost this ability(probably in relation to his 0.00% synch rate) but still weren't completely sure since he still managed to awoke EVA-01 during operation US, hence the DSS Choker. But then why use such a complicated device like the DSS Choker, initially made for Kaworu, an Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Jul 10, 2013 7:50 am The suggestion I got from the movies was that only Evas 01, 13, Shinji, Kaworu, and maybe Rei and 06 had that special "something" for Impact compatibility, and only when used together. When Unit 01 ate Zeruel and 13 ate the 12th Angel, they immediately switched on their radiant giant forms. But if you notice, the reverse doesn't happen; Zeruel turns into a nightmare girl after eating Eva 00, Bardiel and Eva 03 turn limber and learn how to backflip, and 12/Mark 06 get a glowing visor and freakish flexiblity, but they can't open the Doors of Guf despite having the same components as the awakened Evas. If Asuka were a potential trigger, I think it would have happened while she was absorbed in Eva 03, but it never did. I think NERV was more concerned about the Angel imparting her with its powers or doing a mindswap with her. Nobody in Wille shows concern about that or letting her back into Unit 02. Even if she was a possible Trigger, Unit 02 seems to have a very "stable" build compared to the other Evas. It never does any freaky regeneration, grows extra limbs, shoots lasers, or anything. It doesn't even move without power. Even its "berserker" mode has to be forced and is still subject to battery limits.

[]:             Quote Post by Willynka » Wed Jul 10, 2013 8:50 am BlueBasilisk wrote: The suggestion I got from the movies was that only Evas 01, 13, Shinji, Kaworu, and maybe Rei and 06 had that special "something" for Impact compatibility, and only when used together. When Unit 01 ate Zeruel and 13 ate the 12th Angel, they immediately switched on their radiant giant forms. But if you notice, the reverse doesn't happen; Zeruel turns into a nightmare girl after eating Eva 00, Bardiel and Eva 03 turn limber and learn how to backflip, and 12/Mark 06 get a glowing visor and freakish flexiblity, but they can't open the Doors of Guf despite having the same components as the awakened Evas. If Asuka were a potential trigger, I think it would have happened while she was absorbed in Eva 03, but it never did. I think NERV was more concerned about the Angel imparting her with its powers or doing a mindswap with her. Nobody in Wille shows concern about that or letting her back into Unit 02. Even if she was a possible Trigger, Unit 02 seems to have a very "stable" build compared to the other Evas. It never does any freaky regeneration, grows extra limbs, shoots lasers, or anything. It doesn't even move without power. Even its "berserker" mode has to be forced and is still subject to battery limits.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Jul 10, 2013 8:23 pm I know, I was merely pointing out that if Asuka were a potential trigger, she probably wouldn't be doing anything like that in her own Eva since it's so docile. That both of them have four arms is a very interesting point and something I hadn't considered before. It would come as little surprise if Eva 03's little stunt inspired Eva 13's second set of arms, both in universe and out.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Jul 10, 2013 8:29 pm 4-armed Eva goes waaaaaaay back, including one set of arms merged across the chest: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/633124/Evangelion-13-fate-mechanics-etc/#633124

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Jul 10, 2013 8:33 pm So it does! It's always cool seeing an old concept pulled out of retirement and given a fresh coat of paint.

[]:             Quote Post by Willynka » Thu Jul 11, 2013 3:10 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: 4-armed Eva goes waaaaaaay back, including one set of arms merged across the chest: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/633124/Evangelion-13-fate-mechanics-etc/#633124

 can't open the Doors of Guf despite having the same components as the awakened Evas. If Asuka were a potential trigger, I think it would have happened while she was absorbed in Eva 03, but it never did. I think NERV was more concerned about the Angel imparting her with its powers or doing a mindswap with her. Nobody in Wille shows concern about that or letting her back into Unit 02. Even if she was a possible Trigger, Unit 02 seems to have a very "stable" build compared to the other Evas. It never does any freaky regeneration, grows extra limbs, shoots lasers, or anything. It doesn't even move without power. Even its "berserker" mode has to be forced and is still subject to battery limits.
